title: Smoky Velvety Dutch Beef Stew
description: A rich and flavorful Dutch stew featuring tender shredded beef in a smoky velvety sauce, perfect for a midnight craving. This halal-friendly dish is made with sauteed onions and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat butter in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add beef pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add beef broth, tomato paste, and browned beef, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 2.5 hours, or until beef is tender.
Shred beef with two forks and return to pot.
Stir in flour to thicken sauce, and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or thyme, if desired.
